stage_title: 同步互斥与进程间通信

answers.stem: 该内核提供了哪些同步原语？（SpinLock/Mutex/RwLock/Semaphore/Condvar/WaitQueue 等；列出类型定义证据）

fact_answers.notes: primitive_or_ipc_object 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
operation_impl 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
scheduler_blocking 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
race_deadlock_guard 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
semantic_boundary 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
negative_search_coverage 见本题证据。

value.primitive_or_ipc_object: 已实现 SpinLock、Sleeplock(阻塞 mutex 型锁)、WaitQueue、sleep/wakeup、Pipe、signal；未发现 RwLock、Counting Semaphore、Condvar/Monitor、futex、SysV msg/sem/shm、barrier。
value.operation_impl: spinlock 使用 __sync 原子交换忙等；sleeplock 通过 sleep/wakeup 阻塞；pipe 使用 wait_queue 和环形缓冲；signal 有 sigaction/kill/sigreturn/trampoline。
value.scheduler_blocking: sleep(chan,lk) 原子释放调用者锁、挂入 SLEEPING 并 sched；wakeup 将同 chan 睡眠进程转 RUNNABLE。
value.race_deadlock_guard: spinlock push_off 防中断重入；sleep 在 proc_lock 与调用锁之间切换防丢 wakeup；未发现全局锁顺序。
value.semantic_boundary: 这些主要是内核内部同步，pipe/signal 是用户可见 IPC；未把 mutex 等同于 counting semaphore。

answers.notes: 同步原语强证据集中在 sync、sched、fs/pipe、sched/signal；若题面列出的原语未列为已实现，均由负向搜索支撑。

evidence.excerpt: struct spinlock { uint locked; char *name; struct cpu *cpu; }; declares initlock/acquire/release/holding.
acquire disables interrupts then loops on __sync_lock_test_and_set(&lk->locked,1); release fences and __sync_lock_release(&lk->locked), then pop_off().
struct sleeplock has locked, embedded spinlock lk, name, pid; declares acquiresleep/releasesleep/holdingsleep/trysleeplock.
acquiresleep holds lk and while locked calls sleep(lk,&lk->lk), then marks locked/pid; releasesleep clears locked/pid, calls wakeup(lk), releases lk.
wait_queue is a spinlock plus doubly-linked list head; wait_node stores chan and list; helpers add/delete/next/is_first.
sleep enters proc critical section, releases caller lock, sets p->chan, removes runnable proc, inserts sleeping proc, calls sched, then reacquires lk; wakeup moves sleepers on chan runnable.
struct pipe contains spinlock, writer/reader wait_queue, nread/nwrite counters, readopen/writeopen, pdata and fixed data[PIPE_SIZE]; PIPESIZE(pi) shifts buffer size.
pipealloc allocates two files and a pipe, initializes nread/nwrite/readopen/writeopen, initlock, wait_queue_init for write/read queues, and sets both FDs to FD_PIPE.
pipewritable sleeps on full pipe and wakes readers; pipereadable sleeps on empty pipe and wakes writers; pipewrite/piperead copy through circular pdata using nwrite/nread modulo PIPESIZE.
sys_pipe calls pipealloc(&rf,&wf) and copyout2 to return fd pair to user space.
syscall table registers SYS_rt_sigaction -> sys_rt_sigaction; syscall() special-cases SYS_rt_sigreturn to call sigreturn without saving a return value.
sys_rt_sigaction copyin2/copyout2 handler fields and calls set_sigaction; sys_kill reads pid/sig and calls kill(pid,sig).
sighandle allocates sig_frame and trapframe, saves old trapframe, sets epc to sig_handler trampoline and a0/a1 to signum/handler; sigreturn frees current trapframe and restores saved frame.
sig_handler jalr a1 then issues SYS_rt_sigreturn ecall; default_sigaction exits with -1.

Search also covered rwlock/semaphore/condvar/futex/SysV/barrier and found no implemented objects; searched_keywords=spinlock, mutex, rwlock, semaphore, condvar, monitor, waitqueue, sleep, wakeup, atomic, deadlock, lock ordering, barrier, message passing, pipe, futex, msgget, semop, shmget; searched_directories=kernel, include, xv6-user, Makefile; file_count=101; match_count=1702; coverage_sufficient=true

answers.value: 阻塞锁（Blocking Mutex，进入等待队列并挂起）
answers.notes: sleeplock 是最接近 Mutex 的实现：被占用时 sleep(lk,&lk->lk)，释放时 wakeup(lk)。

evidence.excerpt: struct sleeplock has locked, embedded spinlock lk, name, pid; declares acquiresleep/releasesleep/holdingsleep/trysleeplock.
acquiresleep holds lk and while locked calls sleep(lk,&lk->lk), then marks locked/pid; releasesleep clears locked/pid, calls wakeup(lk), releases lk.

answers.stem:
sleep / wakeup 不变量 (Sleep-Wakeup Invariant) 分析，按格式填写：
- sleep 入口函数: ___（路径）
- 入睡前持有的锁: ___（无则写 none）
- 防丢 wakeup (Lost Wakeup Prevention) 机制: ___（如：持队列锁检查条件 / 无防护）
- wakeup 函数: ___（路径）
- 唤醒与锁释放顺序: ___（先唤醒后释放 / 先释放后唤醒 / 其他）

fact_answers.notes: primitive_or_ipc_object 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
operation_impl 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
scheduler_blocking 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
race_deadlock_guard 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
semantic_boundary 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
negative_search_coverage 见本题证据。

value.primitive_or_ipc_object: sleep 入口函数: repos/xv6-k210/kernel/sched/proc.c:sleep；wakeup 函数: repos/xv6-k210/kernel/sched/proc.c:wakeup。
value.operation_impl: sleep 入睡前持有的锁为调用者传入的 spinlock lk；若 lk 不是 proc_lock，则先进入 proc_lock 临界区再 release(lk)。
value.scheduler_blocking: 入睡流程设置 p->chan、从 runnable 移除、插入 sleep 队列并 sched；返回后先离开 proc 临界区再 acquire(lk)。
value.race_deadlock_guard: 防丢 wakeup 机制是睡眠路径在 proc_lock 与调用锁之间原子切换；pipe 还在 pi->lock 下检查条件并 sleep，wakeup 时持相应队列/pipe 锁。
value.semantic_boundary: wakeup 与锁释放顺序在 pipeunlock 中是先 wakeup(next->chan) 再 release(queue->lock)；sleeplock releasesleep 中也是 wakeup(lk) 后 release(&lk->lk)。

answers.notes: sleep/wakeup 不变量可由 proc.c 的 sleep 和 pipe/sleeplock 的调用方式闭合。

evidence.excerpt: wait_queue is a spinlock plus doubly-linked list head; wait_node stores chan and list; helpers add/delete/next/is_first.
sleep enters proc critical section, releases caller lock, sets p->chan, removes runnable proc, inserts sleeping proc, calls sched, then reacquires lk; wakeup moves sleepers on chan runnable.
struct pipe contains spinlock, writer/reader wait_queue, nread/nwrite counters, readopen/writeopen, pdata and fixed data[PIPE_SIZE]; PIPESIZE(pi) shifts buffer size.
pipealloc allocates two files and a pipe, initializes nread/nwrite/readopen/writeopen, initlock, wait_queue_init for write/read queues, and sets both FDs to FD_PIPE.
pipewritable sleeps on full pipe and wakes readers; pipereadable sleeps on empty pipe and wakes writers; pipewrite/piperead copy through circular pdata using nwrite/nread modulo PIPESIZE.
sys_pipe calls pipealloc(&rf,&wf) and copyout2 to return fd pair to user space.

answers.notes: sigaction/kill/sigreturn/trampoline 和用户返回前 sighandle 均有实现证据。

evidence.excerpt: syscall table registers SYS_rt_sigaction -> sys_rt_sigaction; syscall() special-cases SYS_rt_sigreturn to call sigreturn without saving a return value.
sys_rt_sigaction copyin2/copyout2 handler fields and calls set_sigaction; sys_kill reads pid/sig and calls kill(pid,sig).
sighandle allocates sig_frame and trapframe, saves old trapframe, sets epc to sig_handler trampoline and a0/a1 to signum/handler; sigreturn frees current trapframe and restores saved frame.
sig_handler jalr a1 then issues SYS_rt_sigreturn ecall; default_sigaction exits with -1.

value.primitive_or_ipc_object: 有 sigaction 列表、sig_frame 链和 sig_trampoline。
value.operation_impl: sighandle 保存原 p->trapframe 到 sig_frame，分配新 trapframe，把 epc 指向 sig_handler trampoline，a0=signum，a1=用户 handler 或 default_sigaction。
value.scheduler_blocking: kill 若目标进程 SLEEPING，会把它从睡眠队列移到 PRIORITY_IRQ runnable。
value.race_deadlock_guard: sigreturn 必须处在 sig_frame 中，否则 exit(-1)；恢复时释放当前 trapframe 并把 p->trapframe 还原为保存的 frame->tf。
value.semantic_boundary: 用户 handler 返回后 trampoline 发 SYS_rt_sigreturn ecall，由 syscall() 特判进入 sigreturn 恢复原 trapframe。

answers.notes: signal handler 上下文由内核改写 trapframe 加 trampoline 构建，sigreturn 恢复原 trapframe。

evidence.excerpt: syscall table registers SYS_rt_sigaction -> sys_rt_sigaction; syscall() special-cases SYS_rt_sigreturn to call sigreturn without saving a return value.
sys_rt_sigaction copyin2/copyout2 handler fields and calls set_sigaction; sys_kill reads pid/sig and calls kill(pid,sig).
sighandle allocates sig_frame and trapframe, saves old trapframe, sets epc to sig_handler trampoline and a0/a1 to signum/handler; sigreturn frees current trapframe and restores saved frame.
sig_handler jalr a1 then issues SYS_rt_sigreturn ecall; default_sigaction exits with -1.

answers.stem:
死锁四必要条件（Coffman Conditions）在该内核中是否均成立？
请逐条作答（互斥 Mutual Exclusion / 持有并等待 Hold-and-Wait / 不可剥夺 No Preemption / 循环等待 Circular Wait），并结合 SpinLock/Mutex 的实现给出证据或写「不适用」。

fact_answers.notes: mutual_exclusion_condition 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
hold_and_wait_condition 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
no_preemption_condition 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
circular_wait_or_ordering 仅有弱线索，不能单独支撑 implemented。
deadlock_policy 经覆盖搜索未发现实现证据。
negative_search_coverage 见本题证据。

value.mutual_exclusion_condition: 成立：spinlock/sleeplock 都有 locked 状态和互斥进入。
value.hold_and_wait_condition: 可能成立：代码中存在嵌套锁/持锁 sleep 模式，例如 sleeplock 持内部 lk 检查后 sleep，pipe 持 pi->lock 检查条件。
value.no_preemption_condition: 成立：锁释放由持有者显式 release/releasesleep；未发现抢占式剥夺锁。
value.circular_wait_or_ordering: 循环等待风险未被全局消除；未发现锁顺序规范或 ABBA 检测。
value.deadlock_policy: 未发现预防/避免/检测恢复机制，策略更接近忽略。

answers.notes: Coffman 条件在锁语义上基本具备，循环等待未见系统性消除。

answers.value: 忽略 (Ostrich Algorithm)：不处理，依赖外部重启
answers.notes: 源码未发现死锁预防/避免/检测恢复，已有锁只提供互斥与阻塞。

answers.stem:
经典同步问题验证 (Classic Synchronization Problems, Stallings Ch5)：
以下三个经典问题在该内核中是否有对应实现或测试？
- 生产者-消费者 (Producer-Consumer / Bounded Buffer)：___（implemented/not_found + 证据）
- 读者-写者 (Readers-Writers)：___（实现了读者优先/写者优先/公平？ + 证据）
- 哲学家就餐 (Dining Philosophers)：___（implemented/not_found）

fact_answers.notes: primitive_or_ipc_object 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。
operation_impl 有源码定义/实现/调用证据。

value.primitive_or_ipc_object: 生产者-消费者：implemented（pipe 是有界字节缓冲和读写端阻塞唤醒路径）。
value.operation_impl: 读者-写者：not_found（未发现 RwLock 或读者优先/写者优先/公平测试）。
value.race_deadlock_guard: pipe 的生产者-消费者路径通过 wqueue/rqueue 和 pi->lock 防止并发读写竞争。
value.semantic_boundary: pipe 可作为 bounded-buffer IPC；不等同于 Stallings 中专门的 readers-writers/dining philosophers 测试。

answers.notes: 经典同步问题中只有 pipe 可对应生产者-消费者，其余未发现。

evidence.excerpt: struct pipe contains spinlock, writer/reader wait_queue, nread/nwrite counters, readopen/writeopen, pdata and fixed data[PIPE_SIZE]; PIPESIZE(pi) shifts buffer size.
pipealloc allocates two files and a pipe, initializes nread/nwrite/readopen/writeopen, initlock, wait_queue_init for write/read queues, and sets both FDs to FD_PIPE.
pipewritable sleeps on full pipe and wakes readers; pipereadable sleeps on empty pipe and wakes writers; pipewrite/piperead copy through circular pdata using nwrite/nread modulo PIPESIZE.
sys_pipe calls pipealloc(&rf,&wf) and copyout2 to return fd pair to user space.
